description: Company of One shared hooks for Claude Code and Codex session continuity

hooks.command: bash "${COMPANY_OF_ONE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:?Set COMPANY_OF_ONE_PLUGIN_ROOT to the plugin root}}}/hooks/scripts/session-start.sh"
bash "${COMPANY_OF_ONE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:?Set COMPANY_OF_ONE_PLUGIN_ROOT to the plugin root}}}/hooks/scripts/pre-compact.sh"
bash "${COMPANY_OF_ONE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:?Set COMPANY_OF_ONE_PLUGIN_ROOT to the plugin root}}}/hooks/scripts/post-compact.sh"
